output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?symphony ?label WHERE {
  ?symphony wdt:P86 wd:Q254 ; wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q206595 ; rdfs:label ?label
  FILTER CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , "symphony no. 7")
  .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
}
LIMIT 1

args.answer: The 2nd movement of Beethoven's Symphony No. 7 (Op. 92) is featured in The King's Speech. While Wikidata may not explicitly connect this piece to the film due to incomplete structured data, this fact is well-documented in film credits and external sources.
